---
title: "Morningstar Direct"
page-layout: article
---

# Morningstar Direct

## Description

Investment database and analytics platform covering funds, indexes, portfolios, ownership, and performance data worldwide. Supports investment analysis and asset management research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Workstation Access, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

Available at Marx Library on a dedicated workstation.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://guides.library.yale.edu/MorningstarDirect)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
